2230840.name: QLewds
2230840.description:
QLewds is an upcoming Free-to-Play 3 vs 3 online multiplayer clash in a large 2D arena. The game aims to bridge aspects of MOBAs, Metroidvanias, 2D Platformers, and Brawlers into a novel gaming experience. The game has just entered Early Access and its beta phase.

Victory is achieved for one team by destroying the enemy's throne. Thrones are invulnerable until the opposing team collects enough Ether. Ether is gained in a variety of ways, including destroying enemy team's flowers, killing enemy players, and other unique in game objects.

Gameplay is split between day and night cycles. During daytime players can focus on the lanes, where the flowers are active. At night the game opens up, with the flowers sleeping and neutral enemies spawning throughout the map.

Basically, you begin the game weak and pathetic. Through superior performance you end a match like a boss by leveling up, earning gold, buying upgraded skills, passive upgrades, and active upgrades, beating scary bosses, making sick plays, discovering hidden secrets, sniping some queeps, laughing at a scrub, and probably some other stuff.

It's a game, have fun, sorry about the lava.

Thanks for supporting independent game development <3
